CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The Membership Level of the most recent (by Close Date) won Membership Opportunity where this Contact has the primary Opportunity Contact Role. Uses the Closed Won Memberships filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The membership level from the most recent won Membership Opportunity where this Contact is the primary donor.
CustomField.label: Last Membership Level
